## Skill checklist (for new skills)

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has `name`, `description`, and `tags` frontmatter
- [ ] `description` names products, verbs, and example user phrasings
- [ ] `EXAMPLES.md` has 2–3 prompt/expected-behaviour pairs
- [ ] Body is under 10 kB; long material is under `references/`
- [ ] `Why this exists` section is present and links to the motivating article or incident
